prose: Fukui reactivity indices for furan computed at DFT tier 'standard' (B3LYP/def2-TZVP, density-fit, PySCF RKS), gas phase, charge 0 multiplicity 1 for the neutral; cation charge +1 mult 2; anion charge −1 mult 2. Geometry: user-supplied furan.xyz, not re-optimized. Partial charges: Mulliken (PySCF). Finite-difference Fukui indices f+, f−, f0, and dual descriptor (f+−f−) computed for all 9 atoms (1 O, 4 C, 4 H). The most electrophilic site (largest f+) is atom 5 (C) with f+ = 1.9242931; the most nucleophilic site (largest f−) is also atom 5 (C) with f− = 0.1616371. Fukui charge-conservation integrity checks both pass: sum(f+) = 1.0000, sum(f−) = 1.0000. Integrity: trustworthy = true. No warnings reported. The headline value reported is the maximum f+ (most electrophilic site). Negative Mulliken Fukui values on O and H atoms are expected artefacts of the Mulliken partitioning scheme. CLI: /home/erobles/chem-skills/mcp_server/chemkit_engine/cli.py fukui --method dft --tier standard furan.xyz.
